photoURL.description: The user's profile picture URL (can be base64).

totalEarnings.description: Total money earned from waste deposits.

totalTransactions.description: Total number of waste deposits made.

createdAt.description: When the user account was created.

role.description: The user's role in the system.

Transaction.title: Transaction
Transaction.description: A record of a waste deposit.

userId.description: The ID of the user who made the deposit.

amount.description: The amount earned from this deposit.

type.description: The type of waste deposited (e.g., organic, recyclable).

Post.title: Post
Post.description: A community post shared by a user.

userId.description: The ID of the user who created the post.

authorName.description: The name of the author at the time of posting.

authorPhoto.description: The photo URL of the author at the time of posting.

content.description: The text content of the post.

imageUrl.description: An optional image URL attached to the post.

likes.description: The number of likes the post has received.

commentCount.description: The number of comments on the post.

Comment.title: Comment
Comment.description: A comment on a community post.

userId.description: The ID of the user who commented.

authorName.description: The name of the author at the time of commenting.

authorPhoto.description: The photo URL of the author at the time of commenting.

content.description: The text content of the comment.

parentId.description: The ID of the parent comment (for replies).

Like.title: Like
Like.description: A like on a community post.

userId.description: The ID of the user who liked the post.
